# PERF-181 positive: json.NewDecoder without .UseNumber()
lang: go
file: PERF-181-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"io"
)

type Row struct {
	ID   int64
	Name string
}

func Decode(r io.Reader, out *Row) error {
	dec := json.NewDecoder(r)
	return dec.Decode(out)
}
